results.text:
I speak for all web3 jobbers when i say we’re tired of seeing the fake ‘we're hiring’ posts and fake ‘Job available’ posts just to farm likes, impressions and replies.
You're not fooling anyone anymore. Either the role is ghost or it's pre-wired to your inner circle already.
Engagement farming at the expense of real builders is lame tbh. Do better !

If you feel attacked by this, DO BETTER !
